nasb.text: Samuel answered Saul and said, “I am the seer. Go up before me to the high place, for you shall eat with me today; and in the morning I will let you go, and will tell you all that is on your mind.

esv.text: Samuel answered Saul, “I am the seer. Go up before me to the high place, for today you shall eat with me, and in the morning I will let you go and will tell you all that is on your mind.

cnv.text: 撒母耳回答掃羅：“我就是先見，請你在我前面上邱壇去。今天你們要與我一同吃飯，明天早晨我就送你回去。你心裡的一切事，我都會告訴你。

ccb.text: 撒母耳答道：“我就是先见。你先上丘坛去，今天你要和我一起吃饭。明天早上我会送你上路，并把你想知道的事告诉你。
